completed_tasks.name: Externalize scoring config to scoring.json + tune subcommand
Gitignore scoring.json and outlook-ui.md, add example templates

blockers.description: CR-01 (Advisory): Session URL check in lib/digest.js and lib/read.js — isLoginUrl() is called on raw batch stdout that may contain more than just the URL line. Risk: login redirect may go undetected if the URL line is embedded in other output. Discovered during Phase 4 code review.
blockers.workaround: Current implementation works in practice; fix recommended before Phase 5 or as a quick task

decisions.decision: scoring.json and references/outlook-ui.md are now gitignored
decisions.rationale: scoring.json contains company-specific bulk patterns; outlook-ui.md evidence section contains real names, email addresses, message content, and sensitive metadata

decisions.decision: External scoring config via scoring.json with hardcoded fallback
decisions.rationale: Bulk patterns and urgency keywords are personal preferences that differ per user; externalized so users can calibrate without editing source
Runs 25-query inbox sampling to evaluate tier distribution; helps new users calibrate scoring.json on install

decisions.decision: Unread bonus: +40 human senders, +20 channel/system senders, 0 bulk senders
decisions.rationale: Bulk newsletters being unread is not a signal of importance; channels should score lower than direct human communication

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 5 to begin Phase 5 skill packaging
context_notes: Phase 4 is fully verified and reviewed. Two quick tasks completed post-phase: (1) externalized scoring criteria to scoring.json with tune subcommand for calibration; (2) gitignored sensitive files (scoring.json, outlook-ui.md) and added example templates (.env.example, scoring.json.example, references/outlook-ui.example.md). Phase 5 writes SKILL.md and all reference docs for the calling agent. The CR-01 session URL check advisory should be addressed either as a quick task before Phase 5 or noted in Phase 5 documentation.
